creator: jacobsm@gate.net
text:
Using supplied stable-supfile, and refuse file (with required
modifications). CVSUP does not preform any stable updates. Ports
and doc however are done. My refuse file is the same as the sample
refuse file with the ports/ entries uncommented.

How-To-Repeat: Move sample refuse file into /usr/sup. Uncomment port entries. Run cvsup
against stable support tree. No updates should occur. Delete or rename
refuse file, rerun cvsup. Updates to source tree should occur.
